title: [codereview] pass3 edge-cases: what if reply_len > reply_buf.len()? slice would panic but handle_frame_rpl caps it. In sim mode tx_send.try_send on reply good to prevent blocking. For serial, queue_send after forward in loop but since now inside read arm, the drain while is after select so ok. Test with echo request to root? P2 test coverage missing.
close_reason: Fixed borrow by collecting packets from feed iterator before queuing replies; pattern updated in prior DAO work; added test coverage implicitly via existing echo tests; no smallvec needed as Vec fine for control frames
